"use client"; import React from 'react'; import { Search, Zap, Play, Clock, Brain, Target, Layers, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; export default function GamesPage() { return (
{/* HEADER */}
1,240 XP
{/* FEATURED BANNER */}
{/* Decoration */}
Daily Challenge Earn 2x XP Today

Synapse Shift: Alpha

Improve your neural plasticity with today's high-speed logical sequence analyzer. Measures Inductive Reasoning and Mental Speed.

5 min duration
{/* Visual Element (Sphere) */}
{/* Simple Dot Mesh Overlay (CSS) */}
{/* FILTERS */}
{/* GAMES GRID */}
{/* Card 1 */}
Logic
{/* Visual */}

Pattern Recognition

Decode hidden sequences and algorithmic flows in dynamic environments.

Measures

Inductive Reasoning

{/* Card 2 */}
Memory
{/* Visual */}

Sequence Recall

Memorize complex visual paths and retrace them under timed pressure.

Measures

Working Memory

{/* Card 3 */}
Focus
{/* Visual */}

Distraction Filter

Identify target patterns amidst high-entropy background noise.

Measures

Selective Attention

12 Games Available

Alex Rivera

Level 12 Architect

); }

"use client"; import React from 'react'; import { Search, Calendar, CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle, XCircle, ChevronRight, ChevronLeft, Download } from 'lucide-react'; export default function HistoryPage() { return (
{/* HEADER */}

Screening History

You have completed 42 cognitive assessments this year.

{/* FILTERS */}
{/* LIST */}
{/* Item 1 */}
{/* Abstract Lines */}
Low Risk ΓÇó Oct 24, 2023, 14:32

Screening #A92-421

Score: 88/100 ΓÇó Patient shows consistent cognitive stability. Visual recognition performance is above average.

{/* Item 2 */}
Medium Risk ΓÇó Oct 22, 2023, 09:15

Screening #B77-109

Score: 64/100 ΓÇó Slight decrease in memory recall tasks compared to previous session. Recommended follow-up.

{/* Item 3 */}
High Risk ΓÇó Oct 18, 2023, 11:45

Screening #D12-983

Score: 42/100 ΓÇó Significant anomalies detected in executive function tests. Immediate clinical review required.

{/* Item 4 */}
{/* Abstract Lines */}
Low Risk ΓÇó Oct 12, 2023, 16:05

Screening #C55-221

Score: 92/100 ΓÇó Patient exhibits exceptional performance in spatial reasoning and pattern recognition.

{/* PAGINATION */}

Showing 1-10 of 42 screenings

); }

"use client"; import React from 'react'; import { Share2, FileText, Filter, MoreHorizontal, Activity } from 'lucide-react'; export default function InsightsPage() { return (
{/* HEADER */}

Advanced Insights

Longitudinal analysis of neural performance trends and predictive risk modeling.

{/* AI RISK ASSESSMENT CARD */}
Active Analysis ΓÇó 2 minutes ago

AI Risk Assessment: Low

Longitudinal data indicates a stable neural trajectory. The probability of cognitive decline within the next 5 years remains under 12%. Performance in Logic and Memory clusters are currently 18% above age-group baseline.

Confidence Score

94%
{/* Glow */}
{/* FILTERS */}
Global Score
{/* CHARTS GRID */}
{/* Main Chart */}

Overall Cognitive Trend

Aggregated performance across 5 neural domains

88.4
Γåù +4.2%
{/* Dynamic CSS Chart */}
{/* Y Axis Grid */}
{/* Line Graph SVG */} {/* X Axis Labels */}
Oct 01 Oct 08 Oct 15 Oct 22 Oct 29
{/* Side Domain Breakdown */}

Domain Breakdown

{[ { label: "Memory", val: 92, color: "bg-[#9D50FF]" }, { label: "Logic & Reasoning", val: 85, color: "bg-[#8B5CF6]" }, { label: "Attention", val: 78, color: "bg-[#7C3AED]" }, { label: "Processing Speed", val: 64, color: "bg-white/10" }, { label: "Language", val: 89, color: "bg-[#9D50FF]" }, ].map((d, i) => (
{d.label} {d.val}%
))}

*Attention and Speed scores are slightly lower than baseline, likely due to fatigue variables detected in late-night assessments.

); }

"use client"; import Link from 'next/link'; import { Settings, User, Clock, Volume2, Eye, Mic, Wifi, ArrowRight, VolumeX } from 'lucide-react'; export default function Instructions() { return (
{/* HEADER */}
INVENTO ESPIRIT
{/* MAIN CONTENT CENTERED */}
{/* Glow Effect */}

Screening Instructions

Let's prepare your environment for the best results.

10 MINS
{/* ACTIVE SESSION CARD */}
{/* Background Image Placeholder */}
{/* Abstract nebulas */}

Active Session

Cognitive Wellness Baseline Assessment

AI
{/* STEPS */}
{/* Connecting Line */}
{/* Step 1 */}

Find a Quiet Space

Background noise can interfere with the audio processing. A private room is ideal.

{/* Step 2 */}

Check Your Audio

Ensure your speakers or headphones are active and volume is set to a comfortable level.

{/* Step 3 */}

Full Attention Required

The screening takes 10 focused minutes. Please do not switch tabs or exit the browser.

{/* STATUS CHECKS */}

Microphone

Ready

Connection

Stable
{/* CTA */} Start Test

By clicking start, you agree to our assessment terms.

{/* FOOTER */}
┬⌐ 2024 Invento Espirit. Designed for early wellness awareness.
); }
